channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PAGASA Issues Wind Signal for Super Typhoon Bavi in Cagayan
item.description: Super Typhoon Bavi, which has been tracking in the Philippine area of responsibility, has been assigned the local name 'Inday' by the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Admi...

item.title: Air Canada Adjusts U.S. Flights Amid Fuel Costs and Declining Demand
item.description: Air Canada has announced plans to cut or delay eight U.S.-bound routes this winter, citing high jet fuel costs and reduced demand as key factors. The airline is particularly impacting flights to the A...

item.title: NYC high-rise evacuation as structural issues prompt collapse zone
item.description: A high-rise building under construction in Midtown East, New York City, was evacuated after reports of structural instability, prompting emergency responders to establish a collapse zone. The 37-story...

item.title: Federal judge blocks DOJ subpoena over expired election investigation
item.description: A federal judge appointed by former President Donald Trump has blocked the Justice Department's attempt to subpoena extensive records from Fulton County election workers related to the 2020 presidenti...

item.title: 30-year-old man sentenced to 30 years for rape and robbery in Freedom Park
item.description: A 30-year-old man, Thabang Letsholo, has been handed an effective 30-year direct imprisonment sentence by the Tlhabane Magistrates' Court for raping a woman and robbing a young couple in Freedom Park ...

item.title: B.C. Nurses' Union expands job action after alleging employer intimidation and filing labour board complaint
item.description: The BC Nurses' Union says it will broaden its job action during the week after members reported what the union describes as intimidation by employers while participating in labour action. As part of t...

item.title: Cast of “Miss Behave” shares honest answers in ABS-CBN Rapid Fire quiz
item.description: ABS-CBN released a feature highlighting the cast of the television project “Miss Behave” as they took part in a Rapid Fire quiz that allowed fans to get to know them beyond their on-screen roles. The ...

item.title: DA challenges Tshwane deputy mayor's code of conduct penalty in court
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has initiated legal action against Tshwane deputy mayor and finance MMC Eugene Modise, seeking to overturn a two-month salary fine imposed for breaching the Councillors’ C...

item.title: Fisher Stevens' Cancer Battle and Recovery Journey
item.description: Fisher Stevens, known for his role in 'Succession,' has shared details about his past battle with Hodgkin's disease, a type of neck cancer that affected his lymphatic system. Diagnosed at 15, the acto...

item.title: Meta Announces Child Safety Measures Following Government Notice
item.description: New Delhi, July 10, 2026: In response to a government notice regarding child safety measures on social media platforms, Meta (Facebook) has announced a series of steps to enhance online safety for chi...

item.title: The Maccabees Perform New Track 'Ballad Of So Long' During Edinburgh Show
item.description: The Maccabees, the reunited indie band, debuted their new track 'Ballad Of So Long' during an intimate performance at Edinburgh’s Corn Exchange on July 6, 2026. The song, described as a warm and slow-...

item.title: Lithuania's Parliament Considers Removing Nuclear Weapons Ban
item.description: Lithuania's president, Gitanas Nausėda, announced that there is near-unanimous support among parliamentary leaders to remove the constitutional ban on nuclear weapons and foreign military bases. The d...

item.title: Global market volatility rises amid Hormuz tensions and AI stock corrections
item.description: Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz have escalated with three tankers attacked, threatening global energy supplies as countries seek to restore normal shipping practices. This comes alongside a sharp dec...

item.title: Former Arsenal Defender Shares Heartbreaking Story of Losing Wealth and Homes Due to Divorce
item.description: Ex-Arsenal defender Emmanuel Eboué has opened up about his devastating divorce experience, revealing how he lost three properties, multiple cars, and a significant portion of his wealth. The former Cô...

item.title: Tanzania advocates for global collaboration on AI governance to ensure equitable development

item.title: Environmental justice group sues California over carbon market overhaul
item.description: An environmental justice group is suing California's top air regulator over its overhaul of the state's cap-and-invest carbon market program, alleging it bypassed required environmental reviews for a ...

item.title: Arthur Zwane's potential role in Bafana Bafana's future structures
item.description: The article discusses the potential appointment of Arthur Zwane as a coach within the Bafana Bafana setup, highlighting his qualifications and experience. Zwane, currently head coach of Amazulu, is li...

item.title: Kenya's Historic Sites and Monuments: A Guide to Cultural Heritage
item.description: Kenya's historic built environments, including museums, monuments, and ancient ruins, offer a glimpse into the country's rich history and cultural heritage. The article highlights 20 notable sites acr...

item.title: Equity Bank Launches Loan Program for Vehicle Gas Conversion
item.description: Kenyan financial institution Equity Bank has introduced a new loan product aimed at helping vehicle owners transition their cars from traditional fuel systems to gas-powered alternatives. This initiat...

item.title: Summer McIntosh withdraws from Canadian swimming trials due to illness
item.description: Summer McIntosh, the star swimmer from Toronto, has withdrawn from the remaining events of the Canadian swimming trials after consulting with her coach and medical staff. The 19-year-old athlete, who ...
